TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Sasaljak ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Tayimari go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 126 buwan, 282 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 72% kyan ku 204 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 28% kyan ku 78 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, 第12鄰與拉勞蘭部落混居. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Sasaljak hya' ga Takidis. tay mkyahu' na Sasaljak hya' ga Lalauran. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Sasaljak ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Sasaljak ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕas~ɕaljak ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu tajimari ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, ************. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕas~ɕaljak ħjaʔ ɣa taki*is~ɕ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕas~ɕaljak ħjaʔ ɣa lalauran. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ s~ɕas~ɕaljak ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ s~ɕas~ɕaljak ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Sasaljak ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Tayimari go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 126 buwan, 282 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 72% kyan ku 204 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 28% kyan ku 78 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, 第12鄰與拉勞蘭部落混居. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Sasaljak hya' ga Takidis. tay mkyahu' na Sasaljak hya' ga Lalauran. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Sasaljak ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Sasaljak ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕas~ɕaljak ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu tajimari ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, ************. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕas~ɕaljak ħjaʔ ɣa taki*is~ɕ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕas~ɕaljak ħjaʔ ɣa lalauran. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ s~ɕas~ɕaljak ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ s~ɕas~ɕaljak ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
